# Geem.pk — AI-readable site summary

Geem.pk is Pakistan's specialist supplier of military-grade security equipment, surveillance devices, GPS trackers, and covert communications gear. We serve security professionals, agencies, and individuals across Pakistan with genuine branded products and custom agency imports.

## What We Sell

- **Spy Cameras & Surveillance**: Pinhole cameras, covert recording devices, hidden cameras, body-worn cameras (LawMate, Esonic brands)
- **RF Signal Detectors & Bug Sweepers**: TSCM equipment, spectrum analyzers, frequency scanners
- **GPS Trackers**: Vehicle trackers, OBD2 trackers, personal GPS, kids GPS watches, motorcycle trackers, GPS SIM cards (Yuntrack, MiCODUS, SinoTrack, Wanway, TKStar, Garmin)
- **Counter-Surveillance Devices**: Anti-surveillance tools, signal jammers (legal use only), privacy protection
- **Covert Communications**: Encrypted radios, tactical comms equipment
- **3D Printer Filaments**: PLA, ABS, PETG, TPU, Nylon, ASA, Carbon Fiber, PC
- **Industrial Composite Materials**: Carbon fiber sheets/tubes, epoxy resin systems
- **Battery & Power Systems**: Custom battery packs, high-voltage systems, marine batteries

## Key Facts

- **Location**: Pakistan (nationwide delivery, 2–5 business days)
- **Contact**: +92-307-8680005 | info@geem.pk | WhatsApp available
- **Payment Methods**: Cash on Delivery, Bank Transfer, EasyPaisa, JazzCash
- **Custom Imports**: Available for security agencies and organizations on request
- **Brands stocked**: LawMate, Esonic, Yuntrack, MiCODUS, SinoTrack, Wanway, TKStar, Garmin, and more

## Site Structure

- `/shop/products` — Full product catalog with search and filters
- `/shop/category/{id}` — Products by category
- `/shop/products/{slug}` — Individual product detail page with specs and pricing
- `/shop/cart` — Shopping cart
- `/shop/checkout` — Order placement
- `/shop/track` — Order tracking
- `/about` — Company information
- `/contact` — Contact form and details
- `/faq` — Frequently asked questions
- `/privacy` — Privacy policy
- `/terms` — Terms and conditions

## Structured Data

Full JSON-LD structured data is available on the homepage for Organization, WebSite (with SearchAction), and Store entities.

## Sitemap

https://geem.pk/api/sitemap.xml
